post.subject: One Two - Four!
post.body:
Ask me four questions.
Any four, no matter how personal, private or random. I have to answer them honestly. I have to answer them all. I might not answer them publicly, though. In turn, you post this message in your own journal and you have to answer the questions that are asked of you.

comments.body:
have you ever been a lady?
have you ever dressed as a lady?
do you wish you were a lady?
are you a lady?
comments.author: _eljay_

children.body:
Sometimes, but not really. Only for the fact that he is younger than me, therefore gets away with things more than I do and seems to be liked more than me... I feel I have a good relationship with him anyway.

Ronan, hmm... pretty mixed opinion. Dont get me wrong, we are great friends. I trust him and I can talk to him about stuff. But he's lazy, selfish and arrogant... I think he should get a job and stick at it and do a little more than watch tv all day. Yeah I sit on my computer all day... but I have some communication with the outside world on a daily basis. I dont wanna seem to harsh, I love the guy and we are great friends.

Im really not sure of my biggest single ambition. I dont know exactly what I wanna do in terms of a career or job though. Yeah I like computers, though im not sure what else I am interested in if i was to choose something else. Other than that I believe the most important thing in life is happiness. I want to be happy in whatever I do. I want to travel the world, meet people, have lots of money and plenty of close friends. There's just so much beauty in the world. 

Biggest fear... that would have to be being alone and not having anyone to talk to/confide in.
children.author: obsolete_mind

comments.body:
Hmm, I have been trying my darndest to come up with good questions.
But I guess these'll have to do
Have you ever resneted your brother for reasons he cant control?
What do you think of Ronan?
What is your biggest dream/ambition in life?
What is your biggest fear in life?
(Btw in one of my responses I wrote impenetrable jungle and it should be impenetrable forest - ah well)
comments.author: chrissyk_lotn
